obligations.rule: Validate display name when `allow_display_name` or `require_display_name` is true.
obligations.why: The code explicitly checks for display name validity when these options are enabled.

obligations.rule: Reject emails exceeding the default maximum length unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: The code enforces a maximum email length of 254 characters unless overridden.

obligations.rule: Reject emails with domains in the `host_blacklist`.
obligations.why: The code explicitly checks if the domain is blacklisted using `checkHost`.

obligations.rule: Reject emails not in the `host_whitelist` when it is non-empty.
obligations.why: The code explicitly checks if the domain is whitelisted using `checkHost`.

obligations.rule: Validate Gmail-specific rules when `domain_specific_validation` is true and the domain is Gmail.
obligations.why: The code applies Gmail-specific username length and character rules.

obligations.rule: Reject emails with invalid FQDNs unless `allow_ip_domain` is true and the domain is a valid IP.
obligations.why: The code validates the domain as an FQDN or IP based on these options.

obligations.rule: Reject emails with blacklisted characters in the local part.
obligations.why: The code explicitly checks for blacklisted characters in the local part.

obligations.rule: Validate quoted local parts based on `allow_utf8_local_part`.
obligations.why: The code applies different regex patterns for quoted local parts depending on this option.

obligations.rule: Validate unquoted local parts based on `allow_utf8_local_part`.
obligations.why: The code applies different regex patterns for unquoted local parts depending on this option.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered statement at line 41: `return false;` and the uncovered branch at line 40: `if (!display_name_without_quotes.trim())`.
obligations.why: This ensures that the validator correctly handles cases where the display name is empty or consists only of whitespace.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered statement at line 56: `if (!all_start_with_back_slash)` and its true/false branches.
obligations.why: This ensures that the validator correctly handles cases where backslashes in the display name are improperly escaped.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered branch at line 92: `if (!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength)`.
obligations.why: This ensures that the validator correctly enforces the maximum email length when `ignore_max_length` is false.

obligations.rule: Cover the false branch of `display_name.endsWith(' ')` at line 81.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and relates to trimming trailing spaces in display names.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of `options.require_display_name` at line 88.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and ensures emails without display names are rejected when required.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of `!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength` at line 92.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and ensures emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected when `ignore_max_length` is false.

obligations.rule: Covers the false branch of `display_name.endsWith(' ')` at line 81.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and ensures that display names without trailing spaces are handled correctly.

obligations.rule: Covers the true branch of `!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength` at line 92.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and ensures that emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected when `ignore_max_length` is false.

obligations.rule: Covers the true branch of `!isByteLength(username.replace(/\./g, ''), { min: 6, max: 30 })` at line 124.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and ensures that usernames not meeting the byte length constraints are rejected.

test_groups.title: Display name validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers cases where display name is allowed or required.

test_groups.title: Maximum length validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected unless `ignore_max_length` is true.

test_groups.title: Host blacklist validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures emails with blacklisted domains are rejected.

test_groups.title: Host whitelist validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures emails not in the whitelist are rejected when a whitelist is provided.

test_groups.title: Gmail-specific validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers Gmail-specific username rules when `domain_specific_validation` is enabled.

test_groups.title: FQDN and IP domain validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures domains are valid FQDNs or IPs based on options.

test_groups.title: Blacklisted character validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures emails with blacklisted characters in the local part are rejected.

test_groups.title: Quoted local part validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers quoted local part validation with and without UTF-8 support.

test_groups.title: Unquoted local part validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers unquoted local part validation with and without UTF-8 support.

test_groups.title: Empty or whitespace-only display name validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers cases where the display name is empty or consists only of whitespace.

test_groups.title: Improperly escaped backslashes in display name
test_groups.rationale: Covers cases where backslashes in the display name are improperly escaped.

test_groups.title: Maximum email length enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that the validator enforces the maximum email length when `ignore_max_length` is false.

test_groups.title: Trailing space in display name
test_groups.rationale: Covers the false branch of `display_name.endsWith(' ')` to ensure trailing spaces in display names are handled correctly.

test_groups.title: Require display name validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the true branch of `options.require_display_name` to ensure emails without display names are rejected when required.

test_groups.title: Maximum email length validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the true branch of `!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength` to ensure emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected when `ignore_max_length` is false.

test_groups.title: Trailing space in display name (false branch)
test_groups.rationale: Covers the false branch of `display_name.endsWith(' ')` to ensure display names without trailing spaces are handled correctly.

test_groups.title: Maximum email length enforcement (true branch)
test_groups.rationale: Covers the true branch of `!options.ignore_max_length && str.length > defaultMaxEmailLength` to ensure emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected when `ignore_max_length` is false.

test_groups.title: Username byte length validation
test_groups.rationale: Covers the true branch of `!isByteLength(username.replace(/\./g, ''), { min: 6, max: 30 })` to ensure usernames not meeting the byte length constraints are rejected.
